response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in geospatial routing pipelines, critical for this role; their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in web/GIS applications, with no evidence of routing tile optimization, distributed systems for navigation data, or low-latency map processing at scale.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven track record in open-source geospatial platforms (GISCollective, Open Green Map)
Strong background in testing, CI/CD, and developer tooling
concerns: No demonstrated experience with C++ or Rust in production routing systems
Lacks evidence of distributed systems or fault-tolerant data pipeline design
Geospatial work is GIS-focused, not routing tile generation or navigation data optimization
